transcript: Speaker A: Sorry, my English is not good. Speaker B: You should practice everyday. Speaker A: But I don't have anyone to practice with. Speaker B: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. Speaker A: I can speak with you? Speaker B: Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation. Speaker A: But I make a lot of mistakes. Speaker B: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Speaker A: Sounds good. Speaker B: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
on_screen_text: Sorry, my English is not good. You should practice everyday. But I don't have anyone to practice with. That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. I can speak with you? Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation. But I make a lot of mistakes. You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them. Sounds good. Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves. Loora
summary: A split-screen ad featuring a human learner and an AI avatar named Loora. The learner shares her struggles with English practice, and the AI tutor offers real-time feedback and supportive guidance. The ad highlights Loora as an easy, judgment-free way to improve English speaking skills daily.
